response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Vocals for 'Orpheus' phonetically match the provided JSON lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Song lyrics were fully utilized; intro and outro talk, as well as on-screen text, were manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly anchored to vocal bursts, with instantaneous transitions used for rapid-fire lyrics and talk. Included on-screen song credits.
